/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -rdynamic -O3 -fPIC -ggdb -std=c++11 -Wall -Wno-deprecated -Werror -Wno-unused-function -Wno-builtin-macro-redefined -Wno-deprecated-declarations -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libsylar.so -o /home/djintx/workspace/sylar/lib/libsylar.so CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/env.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/mutex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/fd_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/fiber.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/hook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/iomanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/sylar/timer.cpp.o
